 140058040 3d3d3d3d 0a0a4f56 45525649 45570a2d  ====..OVERVIEW.-
 140058050 2d2d2d2d 2d2d2d0a 54686520 432f7374  -------.The C/st
 140058060 64696e20 706f7274 20686173 206e6f20  din port has no 
 140058070 656d6265 64646564 20736372 69707420  embedded script 
 140058080 72756e74 696d652e 204d6f64 73206172  runtime. Mods ar
 140058090 65207075 72652064 6174613a 20746578  e pure data: tex
 1400580a0 74206669 6c657320 6f6e0a64 69736b2c  t files on.disk,
 1400580b0 206d6572 67656420 696e746f 2052414d   merged into RAM
 1400580c0 20617420 73746172 74757020 286f7220   at startup (or 
 1400580d0 61667465 7220226d 6f647320 72656c6f  after "mods relo
 1400580e0 61642229 2e205468 69732069 73206964  ad"). This is id
 1400580f0 65616c0a 666f7220 65706973 6f646963  eal.for episodic
 140058100 20444c43 2c207365 61736f6e 616c2065   DLC, seasonal e
 140058110 76656e74 732c2074 72616e73 6c617469  vents, translati
 140058120 6f6e2070 61636b73 2c20616e 64206c69  on packs, and li
 140058130 63656e73 65642061 64642d6f 6e733a0a  censed add-ons:.
 140058140 73686970 20612066 6f6c6465 72207573  ship a folder us
 140058150 65727320 64726f70 206e6578 7420746f  ers drop next to
 140058160 20746865 69722073 6176652c 206f7220   their save, or 
 140058170 706f696e 74204145 5445525f 4d4f4453  point AETER_MODS
 140058180 20617420 796f7572 0a696e73 74616c6c   at your.install
 140058190 20646972 6563746f 72792e0a 0a504c41   directory...PLA

 1400595f0 524f4f54 0a2d2d2d 2d2d2d2d 2d2d0a44  ROOT.---------.D
 140059600 65666175 6c743a20 73616d65 20646972  efault: same dir
 140059610 6563746f 72792061 7320796f 75722071  ectory as your q
 140059620 7569636b 73617665 2066696c 652c2073  uicksave file, s
 140059630 7562666f 6c646572 20226d6f 6473222e  ubfolder "mods".
 140059640 0a457861 6d706c65 3a206966 20736176  .Example: if sav
 140059650 65206973 2020433a 5c47616d 65735c61  e is  C:\Games\a
 140059660 65746572 6e697461 7336345f 73617665  eternitas64_save
 140059670 2e747874 20207468 656e206d 6f647320  .txt  then mods 
 140059680 676f2069 6e0a2020 20202020 20202043  go in.         C
 140059690 3a5c4761 6d65735c 6d6f6473 5c0a4f76  :\Games\mods\.Ov
 1400596a0 65727269 64652028 66697273 74206d61  erride (first ma
 1400596b0 74636820 77696e73 293a2069 6e2d6761  tch wins): in-ga
 1400596c0 6d652020 6d6f6473 20646972 6563746f  me  mods directo
 1400596d0 7279203c 70617468 3e20207c 20202d2d  ry <path>  |  --
 1400596e0 6d6f6473 203c6469 723e0a20 207c2020  mods <dir>.  |  
 1400596f0 41455445 525f4d4f 44533de2 80a62020  AETER_MODS=...  
 140059700 7c202028 57696e64 6f777329 20202d2d  |  (Windows)  --
 140059710 7069636b 2d6d6f64 73202061 74206c61  pick-mods  at la
 140059720 756e6368 20666f72 20612066 6f6c6465  unch for a folde
 140059730 72206469 616c6f67 2e0a5361 6d652069  r dialog..Same i
 140059740 64656120 666f7220 73617665 733a2020  dea for saves:  
 140059750 2d2d7361 7665203c 70617468 3e20206f  --save <path>  o
 140059760 7220202d 2d706963 6b2d7361 76652020  r  --pick-save  
 140059770 2857696e 646f7773 292e0a0a 4c4f4144  (Windows)...LOAD
 140059780 204f5244 45522026 20444c43 20505249   ORDER & DLC PRI
 140059790 4f524954 5920286d 616e6966 6573742e  ORITY (manifest.
 1400597a0 74787429 0a2d2d2d 2d2d2d2d 2d2d2d2d  txt).-----------
 1400597b0 2d2d2d2d 2d2d2d2d 2d2d2d2d 2d2d2d2d  ----------------
 1400597c0 2d2d2d2d 2d2d2d2d 2d2d2d2d 2d0a5061  -------------.Pa
 1400597d0 636b7320 6c6f6164 20696e20 61736365  cks load in asce
 1400597e0 6e64696e 67206f72 64657220 6f66206d  nding order of m
 1400597f0 616e6966 65737420 22707269 6f726974  anifest "priorit
 140059800 793d2220 286c6f77 65722066 69727374  y=" (lower first
 140059810 292c0a74 68656e20 616c7068 61626574  ),.then alphabet
 140059820 6963616c 6c792062 7920666f 6c646572  ically by folder
 140059830 206e616d 652e2054 6865204c 41535420   name. The LAST 
 140059840 7061636b 20746f20 746f7563 68206120  pack to touch a
